zh.Montreuil-Bellay, Saumur, Maine-et-Loire: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易索馬爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Géraud III Berlay de Montreuïl於大約1157年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易索馬爾時，他的父親Bellay IV de Montreuil48歲，母親Marguerite Geneviève de Thouars33歲。他於1187年與Marguerite d'Avant在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易索馬爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1217年在他的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.Montreuil-Bellay, Saumur, Maine-et-Loire: 法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易索馬爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Géraud III Berlay de Montreuïl于大约1157年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易索馬爾时，他的父亲Bellay IV de Montreuil48岁，母亲Marguerite Geneviève de Thouars33岁。他于1187年与Marguerite d'Avant在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易索馬爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1217年在他的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berlay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Burley  . This surname is now rare in Britain. It may also be a variant of   Birley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of their South German cognate Behrle or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Barley .

variants.name: Burley
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burley, for example in Hampshire, Rutland, Shropshire, and Yorkshire, from Old English burh ‘fortified manor, stronghold’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of Swiss German Bürli: from a diminutive of būr ‘peasant, farmer’ (see Bauer ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montreuïl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Carolle, Edouard, Jean-Pierre, Marcel, Veronique.
French: habitational name from any of a number of places in northern France, so named from Latin monasteriolum, a diminutive of monasterium ‘monastery’. Compare Montroy .

variants.name: Montroy
meanings: French: habitational name from either of the places so called, in Puy-de-Dôme and Charente-Maritime. This surname is very rare in France.

nameMeanings.name: Géraud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Géraud III Berlay de Montreuïl was born about 1157, in Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Bellay IV de Montreuil, was 48 and his mother, Marguerite Geneviève de Thouars, was 33. He married Marguerite d'Avant in 1187, in Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1217, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Géraud III Berlay de Montreuïl est né environ 1157, à Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Bellay IV de Montreuil, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Marguerite Geneviève de Thouars, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite d'Avant en 1187, à Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1217, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Géraud III Berlay de Montreuïl um 1157 in Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bellay IV de Montreuil 48 und seine Mutter Marguerite Geneviève de Thouars 33. Er hat 1187 in Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Marguerite d'Avant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1217 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Marguerite d'Avant nel 1187, nel Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1217, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.Montreuil-Bellay, Saumur, Maine-et-Loire: フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーサウムル
ja.lifeSummary: Géraud III Berlay de Montreuïlが約1157年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーサウムルで生まれた時，父Bellay IV de Montreuilは48歳，母Marguerite Geneviève de Thouarsは33歳であった。1187年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーサウムルでMarguerite d'Avantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.Montreuil-Bellay, Saumur, Maine-et-Loire: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 소머
ko.lifeSummary: Géraud III Berlay de Montreuïl(이)가 대략 1157년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 소머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bellay IV de Montreuil(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite Geneviève de Thouars(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1187년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 소머에서 Marguerite d'Avant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Géraud III Berlay de Montreuïl nasceu aproximadamente 1157, em Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Bellay IV de Montreuil, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite Geneviève de Thouars, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite d'Avant em 1187, em Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1217, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.Montreuil-Bellay, Saumur, Maine-et-Loire: саумур, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Géraud III Berlay de Montreuïl родился около 1157 г. в местности саумур, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Bellay IV de Montreuil было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite Geneviève de Thouars, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite d'Avant в 1187 г. в местности саумур, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1217 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.
